about.title: About SAHAYAK AI
about.subtitle: Empowering Education with Artificial Intelligence
about.description: SAHAYAK AI is a cutting-edge educational platform that leverages the power of artificial intelligence to transform the way students learn and educators teach. Our mission is to make quality education accessible, engaging, and personalized for everyone.
about.missionDescription1: Sahayak AI is an innovative online AI teacher assistant platform designed specifically for Indian students. We understand the unique challenges faced by learners across India - from language diversity to varying educational resources - and we're committed to bridging these gaps through intelligent technology.
about.missionDescription2: Our platform serves as a digital 'sahayak' (assistant) that empowers students across rural and urban India to access quality educational content in their preferred language, helping them navigate through textbooks efficiently and making learning more inclusive and accessible for all.

ourMission.title: Our Mission
ourMission.description: To democratize education in India by providing intelligent, accessible, and personalized learning experiences to students in multiple Indian languages.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered Learning
aiPowered.description: Advanced AI algorithms help Indian students understand complex concepts through personalized explanations in their native languages.

digitalLibrary.title: Digital Library
digitalLibrary.description: Access NCERT and state board textbooks along with educational materials anytime, anywhere across India.

smartAnalysis.title: Smart Content Analysis
smartAnalysis.description: Intelligent chapter detection and content extraction for efficient navigation through Indian curriculum materials.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-Language Support
multiLanguage.description: Supporting Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Marathi, Gujarati and more Indian languages.

offerings.item1: Interactive PDF viewer with smart navigation for Indian textbooks
offerings.item2: Automatic table of contents extraction in multiple scripts
offerings.item3: Chapter-wise content organization for NCERT and state curricula
offerings.item4: AI-assisted learning recommendations tailored for Indian education system
offerings.item5: Multi-language interface supporting major Indian languages

about.studentProjectNote: Sahayak AI is a student project from India, aimed at demonstrating how artificial intelligence can transform education in our country. This platform showcases the potential of AI in making educational resources more accessible to Indian students, regardless of their language or location.

whatWeOffer.title: What We Offer
whatWeOffer.item1: Comprehensive digital library with thousands of textbooks

aiTechnology.title: Advanced AI Technology
aiTechnology.description: Our platform uses state-of-the-art artificial intelligence to enhance learning outcomes.
